solution_description: World leader in enterprise application software. SAP solutions cover ERP, finance, supply chain, procurement and analytics, helping organisations run as intelligent, sustainable enterprises. EFESO leverages SAP S/4HANA and BTP to drive end-to-end digital transformation for manufacturing and retail clients.

Global technology leader providing cloud, AI and productivity solutions at enterprise scale. Microsoft Azure and the Power Platform are EFESO's preferred infrastructure for data lakes, AI-driven analytics, RPA and Copilot-based automation across client engagements.

World's #1 CRM platform, enabling companies to connect with customers in a whole new way. EFESO deploys Salesforce Sales Cloud and Service Cloud to streamline commercial processes, automate pipelines and deliver AI-powered customer insights for B2B and B2C organisations.

Leading enterprise automation platform combining RPA, process mining and AI to automate end-to-end business processes. EFESO uses UiPath to rapidly industrialise repetitive operations in finance, HR and supply chain, delivering measurable FTE savings within weeks.

Global leader in process mining and execution management. Celonis extracts real process intelligence from ERP and operational systems, enabling EFESO to identify bottlenecks, benchmark against best practices and trigger automated corrective actions across Order-to-Cash, Procure-to-Pay and other core processes.

Leading supply chain and commerce solutions provider powered by AI and machine learning. EFESO implements Blue Yonder's demand planning, S&OP and warehouse management solutions to help clients achieve best-in-class forecast accuracy and inventory optimisation across complex global networks.

Digital workflow platform that connects people, functions and systems across the enterprise. EFESO deploys ServiceNow to digitise and automate IT, HR and operational workflows, creating unified service experiences and eliminating manual handoffs across large manufacturing organisations.

Unified analytics platform that brings together data engineering, science and AI in a single lakehouse architecture. EFESO uses Databricks to build scalable industrial data platforms, from real-time IoT ingestion to advanced ML models for predictive maintenance and demand sensing.

Cloud-native platform for human capital management and financial planning. EFESO implements Workday HCM to modernise HR operations — from recruiting and onboarding to performance management and payroll — enabling organisations to manage their workforce with greater agility and data-driven insight.

World's most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform, offering over 200 fully featured services. EFESO architects AWS-based cloud strategies for clients seeking scalability, resilience and cost optimisation, with a focus on data platforms, serverless architectures and AI/ML workloads.

Adaptive HR platform designed to unite learning, performance, talent and skills data across the workforce lifecycle. EFESO uses Cornerstone to help manufacturing and services clients build continuous learning cultures, close skills gaps and align talent development with operational strategy.

Cloud data platform enabling organisations to mobilise their data with near-unlimited scale and concurrency. EFESO deploys Snowflake as the foundation for enterprise data mesh architectures, enabling secure data sharing, real-time analytics and AI model serving across business units and partners.

AI-powered integrated business planning platform purpose-built for enterprise supply chain and commercial planning. EFESO implements o9 to replace legacy planning tools and siloed spreadsheets, delivering real-time S&OP, demand sensing and financial reconciliation for global manufacturing clients.
